query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  w.name as worker_name,
  a.demandId,
  a.scheduledStart,
  a.scheduledEnd,
  a.scheduledHours,
  a.actualStart,
  a.actualEnd,
  a.actualHours,
  a.status
FROM assignments a
JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id
WHERE w.name LIKE '%еӯ”д»Ғзҗі%'
  AND a.scheduledStart >= '2026-03-07 00:00:00'
  AND a.scheduledStart < '2026-03-08 00:00:00'
ORDER BY a.scheduledStart;
command:
